_notes: brackets-model does NOT have a native 'Swiss' StageType.
Swiss system maps to type 'round_robin' — it is the closest fit the package supports.

Key difference to document for your frontend: Swiss rounds are NOT pre-generated. Round 2+ pairings are determined AFTER Round 1 results are entered (pairing by current standings). This means your backend must generate each next round dynamically.
For brackets-model purposes, treat Swiss as round_robin with groupCount: 1. Rounds are added incrementally.
Your data shows 1 round (totalCount: 7, totalPages: 1) = Round 1 with 7 matches for 14 players.
Rounds 2-N must be fetched and added to this structure as they are generated by your backend.
Each Swiss round will have 7 matches (14 players / 2), for however many rounds are configured.
